title: Prototype Assumptions before Expensive Build Work
summary: Build and verify design prototype test in survey redesign prototype test session through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain design prototype test from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply design prototype test without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the survey redesign prototype test session case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves design prototype test when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: survey redesign prototype test session.
steps.why: Prototype Assumptions before Expensive Build Work makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in survey redesign prototype test session.

content.text: Prototypes answer questions at the cheapest useful fidelity. Paper or low-fidelity flows can test order and vocabulary; interactive prototypes can test navigation and feedback; coded prototypes can test real browser behavior and access constraints. A polished mockup is still a hypothesis. Test reports connect observed behavior to evidence, decisions, revisions, and remaining uncertainty. Apply it to survey redesign prototype test session.
